calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-29-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for default prove-up hearing.

Dept. 514; Judge Harry L. Jacobs; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:15:28 a.m. and concluding at 09:20:26 a.m.

Plaintiff Alice Tam Poon appearing represented by Jaynry Mak, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Felix Chu not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents offer of proof.
ALICE TAM POON is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and is examined by the Court.

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Alice Tam Poon, and against Defendants Felix Chu and Derek Chu jointly and severally, as follows:

1. Monetary relief in the amount of $159,717.79 for PLaintiff ALICE TAM POON and $105,636.97 for Plaintiff JING LING HUANG, compromised of the following:

a. Principal in the amount of $150,000.00 and interest in the amount of $9,717.79 to Plaintiff ALICE TAM POOM.
b. Principal in the amount of $100,000.00 and interest in the amount of $5,636.97 to Plaintiff JING LIN HUANG

Plaintiff to file a Memorandum of Costs within 15 days.
Proposed judgment to be submitted.
